title: Collaboration to Develop Seawater-Based Carbon Removal Project in Sarawak, Malaysia
content: Boeing [NYSE: BA], SEDC Energy (SEDCE) and carbon removal specialist Equatic have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to develop a carbon removal demonstration facility in the Malaysian state of Sarawak. The project aims to advance carbon removal technology as well as supporting the Sarawak Governmentâ€™s clean energy plans with significant environmental and economic benefits. SEDCE is the new energy arm of the Sarawak Economic Development Corporation. Equaticâ€™s seawater-based technology uses four inputsâ€“seawater, air, rock, and renewable electricityâ€“to remove and store carbon dioxide while simultaneously producing green hydrogen.
author: Analysts Account
